purpose: Measured code-coverage floor contract for the hand-written SDK/CLI/MCP surface. Floors are pinned to the honest measured baseline minus a small margin and ratchet monotonically upward; generated wrapper/src/** is excluded by every package vitest config. Live-key sandbox suites contribute no coverage in CI. DUAL AUTHORITY: each package's vitest.config.ts thresholds mirror these floors so a bare `vitest --coverage` enforces locally; this file (via scripts/check-coverage-floor.mjs / `make coverage`) is the canonical cross-package monotonic ratchet. When you raise a floor here, raise the matching vitest.config.ts thresholds in the same commit.
